response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering fundamentals with 19+ years of experience and is currently working with MCP and agentic workflows at Staff level, providing relevant domain familiarity. However, he does not meet core job requirements: only 2 months into AI/GenAI work versus 8+ years required, Python proficiency is absent despite being a primary required language, and there is no demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM systems—all explicitly required.
strengths: Currently embedded in AI infrastructure work (MCP, agentic workflows) at Staff level with recent direct relevance to the role
Strong TypeScript and full-stack development with 19+ years total software engineering experience
Proven AWS cloud platform experience and distributed systems background (handled millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Python proficiency absent from skills list despite being a primary required language for AI development
Only 2 months into AI/GenAI work; no demonstrated history building production-grade AI solutions over the required 8+ years
No evidence of working with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM systems, or building ML/AI data pipelines

key_factors.factor: Only 2 months in AI role vs. 8+ years required
Recent MCP and agentic workflows experience shows domain awareness
Missing Python and core AI technologies (RAG, vector DB, LLM systems)
